texto: What sort of life have you ledthat you find yourself, an adult male of late middle age,about to weep among the avocados and citrus fruitsin a vast, overlit room next to a bosomy Cuban Grandmawith her sparkly, extravagent eyewear?It's good that your parents are no longer alive.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de August Kleinzahler que provoca sentido da existência e experiência vivida. Ao questionar “What sort of life have you ledthat you find yourself, an adult male of late middle age,about to w…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre vida, produce, weeping, com foco em weeping.
